title: G+ | Gilded Netherite set
description:
Shiny Netherite to calm Piglins down! 
[GearPlus]
body:
![Project title: "GearPlus: Gilded Netherite Module"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7fbe7e42a7585523bbf1122b3b2d0f598b0a7cda.png)
---

### Resource Pack needed to correctly view the items!
[![ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/img/githubbutton_sm.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/T6T81FJU3R)
---

GearPlus is a group of small Data Packs that focuses on adding tools, weapons or armor to Minecraft to thematically and aesthetically diversify the range of acquirable gear without breaking the balance of the vanilla game experience.

The 'Gilded Netherite module' adds the **Gilded Transmuter**, a new Smithing Template which can be used to give Netherite one last small upgrade and smith Netherite equipment into **Gilded Netherite**!

![Every new item added by the Data Pack. Left from right: Gilded Netherite armor, Gilded transmuter, Gilded Netherite tools.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3c4f8ca469a4bd4b49ed2a54de5bf88b2d26219e.png)

---
Gilded Netherite equipment works _exactly_ like the base Netherite one. Tools and armor keep the same durability, armor, damage and mining speed.

However, ~~aside from looking absolutely stunning,~~ wearing any piece of Gilded Netherite armor **prevents Piglins to be aggressive towards the player**, acting as a piece of Golden armor too and making them neutral.

![Renders of Steve wearing Gilded Netherite gear.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/037493a68733ea6282c4ae2c53f2755740245569.png)

---
### Installation
To properly view and use the module, both the Data Pack and the Resource Pack must be installed.

To manually install the Data Pack, simply drop the corresponding .zip file in the 'datapack' folder inside your world folder.
To manually install the required Resource Pack, drop the corresponding .zip file in the 'resourcepacks' folder inside your main MC directory.

The module is extremely lightweight and is compatible with Multiplayer, as long as the Resource Pack is correctly loaded.

Currently supported versions: 1.21.2+

---
### Support 
If you like my Data Packs, Resource Packs or textures, consider **donating**, it would really mean a lot to me. If you are interested in **commissioning** any content, **contact me** on any available platform, I'll try to reach out to you as fast as I can.

**Suggestions** for future Minecraft content are also well received. Thank you for taking a look at my content. :)
